headline: Bankers Say Asia Loan Market to Stay Weak as War Saps Confidence
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Asia’s loan market is heading into the second half of the year with little sign of a rebound, according to bankers, as the fallout from the Iran war continues to suppress confidence among lenders and borrowers.Most Read from BloombergOil, Gas Tankers Cross Hormuz Via Oman-Side Route After U-TurnsGreece Offers Bounty to Catch Ravenous Fish Lured by Warming SeaOil’s Supply Wave, Tumbling Prices Rekindle Fears of Global GlutBrazil Freezes $2 Billion, Pursues Arrests After US Sanction

content.title: Bankers Say Asia Loan Market to Stay Weak as War Saps Confidence
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Asia’s loan market is heading into the second half of the year with little sign of a rebound, according to bankers, as the fallout from the Iran war continues to suppress confidence among lenders and borrowers.Most Read from BloombergOil, Gas Tankers Cross Hormuz Via Oman-Side Route After U-TurnsGreece Offers Bounty to Catch Ravenous Fish Lured by Warming SeaOil’s Supply Wave, Tumbling Prices Rekindle Fears of Global GlutBrazil Freezes $2 Billion, Pursues Arrests After US Sanction
